name: 研究空白与问题
description: 用于指出研究不足、提出问题、说明本文目标和回应空白

expressions.note: 常用且正式，强调已有研究还没有充分展开
expressions.example: The family consequences of gig work remain under-explored.

expressions.note: 语气温和，适合避免过度否定前人工作
expressions.example: Rural students' application strategies have received limited attention.

expressions.en: be rarely examined in relation to
expressions.note: 强调某两个主题之间的连接不足
expressions.example: Housing insecurity is rarely examined in relation to fertility plans.

expressions.note: 更有修辞感，突出主题被主流文献边缘化
expressions.example: Care workers remain at the margins of mobility research.

expressions.en: There is little research on the effects of X on Y.
expressions.note: 比 X is under-researched 更适合接具体因果关系。
expressions.example: There is little research on policy effects on intentions.

expressions.note: 修饰 literature/evidence 时很凝练，语气较正式。
expressions.example: Evidence on this topic remains scant.

expressions.note: 适合把样本选择写成贡献，而不是只说我们研究某群体。
expressions.example: We focus on an under-studied population.

expressions.note: 适合引言开头制造研究必要性。
expressions.example: While policy interest is high, evidence remains limited.

expressions.note: 标准问题提出方式，适合引出本文核心疑问
expressions.example: An open question is whether credentials protect workers during downturns.

expressions.note: 强调机制不清楚，适合从现象过渡到机制
expressions.example: It remains unclear how remote work reshapes household bargaining.

expressions.note: 语气更口语化但仍学术，适合文献综述中承接
expressions.example: We know less about whether these gains persist across cohorts.

expressions.note: 强调知识缺口广泛，适合引言中的空白陈述
expressions.example: Little is known about how siblings shape college trajectories.

expressions.note: 温和指出倾向性局限，不直接批评前人
expressions.example: Prior studies have tended to focus on married couples.

expressions.note: 更直接指出限制来源，适合方法或数据局限
expressions.example: Existing work is limited by short observation windows.

expressions.en: a key limitation of this literature is
expressions.note: 适合清晰定位文献缺口，语气比 tended to 更强
expressions.example: A key limitation of this literature is its reliance on cross-sectional data.

expressions.note: 强调被忽视的对象或机制，适合提出本文切入点
expressions.example: This literature has largely overlooked informal caregiving arrangements.

expressions.note: 最基础清楚，适合直接说明研究对象
expressions.example: This paper examines how layoffs affect subsequent fertility intentions.

expressions.note: 比 examines 更强调主动分析，适合实证研究
expressions.example: We investigate whether school tracking widens class gaps.

expressions.note: 以问题驱动展开，适合引言结尾提出研究问题
expressions.example: We ask how job insecurity enters household decision-making.

expressions.note: 强调拆解复杂机制，适合机制型论文
expressions.example: The analysis seeks to unpack the channels linking debt to marriage.

expressions.en: Drawing on X, this study examines how Y affects Z.
expressions.note: 框架稳定，可把理论、数据和研究对象连成一句。
expressions.example: Drawing on border theory, this study examines how policies affect fertility.

expressions.en: We sum up these considerations in the following hypotheses.
expressions.note: 过渡自然，避免突然列 Hypothesis。
expressions.example: We sum up these considerations in the following hypotheses.

expressions.en: As there are no clear theoretical expectations about X, we...
expressions.note: 用于说明为什么不细分假设或为什么采用探索性分析。
expressions.example: As there are no clear expectations, we formulate a broad hypothesis.

expressions.note: 适合清晰列举多个问题，结构感强
expressions.example: We address three questions about inequality in college completion.

expressions.note: 适合逐一展开问题，语气正式且清楚
expressions.example: The first question concerns variation across birth cohorts.

expressions.note: 适合把研究焦点压缩到一个可检验命题
expressions.example: We focus on whether parental wealth moderates debt effects.

expressions.note: 更书面，强调问题是全文中心
expressions.example: Our inquiry centers on the timing of family transitions.

expressions.en: We address three sets of research questions.
expressions.note: 比 we ask three questions 更正式，适合结构复杂的论文。
expressions.example: We address three sets of research questions.

expressions.en: This research question explores how X shapes Y.
expressions.note: 适合从 question 过渡到 hypothesis，强调关系和机制。
expressions.example: This research question explores how policy shapes intentions.

expressions.en: The first objective is to explore whether...
expressions.note: 适合多目标论文，比目的散写更清楚。
expressions.example: The first objective is to explore whether information matters.

expressions.en: The second objective is to examine whether...
expressions.note: 和 first objective 配套，可清楚展开递进问题。
expressions.example: The second objective is to examine whether effects differ by gender.

expressions.note: 最标准衔接句，适合从空白过渡到本文设计
expressions.example: To address this gap, we use linked employer-employee data.

expressions.note: 语气更直接，但容易显得过满，适合确实有新数据时
expressions.example: To fill this gap, we study first-generation college students.

expressions.en: we bring new evidence to bear on
expressions.note: 强调用新证据推进问题，表达更有学术质感
expressions.example: We bring new evidence to bear on debates about credential inflation.

expressions.note: 强调让不清楚的问题变清楚，语气比 fill 更谨慎
expressions.example: We shed light on how care demands shape job search.

expressions.en: To fill this research gap, this study...
expressions.note: 已有 address-gap 可合并；此处重点是 gap 后接设计。
expressions.example: To fill this research gap, this study uses dyadic data.

expressions.note: 通用贡献表达，强调在既有方向上推进
expressions.example: We extend research on educational assortative mating.

expressions.note: 强调超越前人局限，适合说明新增数据或视角
expressions.example: We move beyond prior work by observing workers over time.

expressions.note: 先承认前人再扩展，语气稳妥
expressions.example: We build on and extend studies of intergenerational mobility.

expressions.note: 强调拓宽对象、区域或机制，而非完全新建领域
expressions.example: The study broadens the scope of research on work-family conflict.

clusters.meaning: 一个令人困惑的现象是

expressions.note: 适合从异常现象引出研究问题，问题意识强
expressions.example: A puzzle arises from the persistence of gender gaps among graduates.

expressions.en: this raises the question of why
expressions.note: 自然地把现象转成问题，适合引言推进
expressions.example: This raises the question of why returns differ by origin.

expressions.note: 直接表达困惑，适合突出反常发现
expressions.example: It is puzzling that mobility stalls despite educational expansion.

expressions.note: 把研究问题定位为经验谜题，适合实证论文
expressions.example: The empirical puzzle is the coexistence of growth and insecurity.

clusters.meaning: 用复杂性、研究问题和宏观趋势提出研究空白

expressions.en: to address the following research questions
expressions.note: 比直接列问题更自然，适合方法前的过渡句。
expressions.example: We use panel data to address the following questions.

expressions.en: owing to the complexity of X
expressions.note: 比 because X is complex 更正式，常用于 gap rationale。
expressions.example: Existing evidence is limited owing to the complexity of relationships.

expressions.en: Little is known about how X shapes Y, where Z.
expressions.note: 适合一句话同时写 gap、关系和特殊情境。
expressions.example: Little is known about how wealth shapes marriage where hukou matters.

expressions.en: This global trend underscores the necessity to investigate X.
expressions.note: underscores 比 shows 更有论证力度，适合引言开头。
expressions.example: This demographic trend underscores the need to study care.
